goal: Apply a narrowly scoped repository fix that resolves a defined defect without introducing regressions.

success_criteria.statement: Required CI checks are passing for the PR head commit.
success_criteria.measurement_method: GitHub check-runs API on PR head sha

success_criteria.statement: Changed files stay within allowed path scope for this intent.
success_criteria.measurement_method: PR changed-files list compared to constraints.allowed_paths

success_criteria.statement: PR includes at least one concrete verification artifact link.
success_criteria.measurement_method: PR body and comments parsed for evidence links

must: Map each executor step to at least one success criterion.
Capture direct tool evidence for action-impacting claims.
must_not: Claim completion based only on agent statements.

authority_gates.name: destructive-change-gate
authority_gates.trigger: Any destructive operation or data-loss risk

stop_conditions: Budget cap exceeded without measurable success-criteria progress.
Repeated CI failure signature appears 3 times.
Required human decision is unresolved for more than 24 hours.
